summary: Iteration 131: 3 Cache Enhancements - All tests passed. Features: 1) Cache Hit Rate Alert - triggers when hit_rate<70% after 10+ requests, 2) Pricing Cache Warming - precomputes popular routes after supplier sync, 3) Global Cache Diagnostics - comprehensive metrics for scaling decisions. Backend: 35/35 tests passed. Frontend: All 15 UI elements verified.
passed_tests: ✅ warm with limit=5 query param works
✅ simulate returns all expected fields (sell_price, margin, pipeline_steps, etc)
✅ Alert triggers after 12 unique cache misses (0% hit rate < 70% threshold)
✅ Frontend: Cache stats bar shows Evictions value
✅ Frontend: Cache stats bar shows Mem (memory) value
✅ Frontend: Hit rate alert banner visible when active alerts exist (data-testid=hit-rate-alert-banner)
✅ Frontend: Alert history section displays items
✅ Frontend: Cache warming button works - toast shows success message
critical_code_review_comments: PricingCache.stats() correctly returns evictions, memory_usage_bytes, memory_usage_mb, active_alerts count
GET /cache/alerts endpoint returns active_alerts list, alert_history list, threshold_pct=70.0, min_requests=10
GET /cache/diagnostics returns comprehensive metrics: global_hit_rate, total_entries, memory_usage_mb, evictions, utilization_pct, warming_status, uptime_seconds
POST /cache/warm/{supplier} precomputes pricing for popular routes from tracked query frequency
GET /cache/popular-routes returns tracked popular routes with query counts
Alert triggers correctly when hit_rate < 70% after 10+ requests
Cache warming called after supplier sync in inventory_sync_service.py (lines 328-333 and 501-508)
Frontend hit-rate-alert-banner displays Turkish message 'Cache hit rate %X threshold %70.0 altinda'
Frontend cache-stats-bar shows new Evictions and Mem fields
Frontend diagnostics-panel has all 6 diagnostic cards with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend telemetry-panel shows supplier warming buttons (warm-{supplier}-btn)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 131 tested 3 NEW cache enhancement features: 1) Cache Hit Rate Alert - GET /cache/alerts returns {active_alerts, alert_history, threshold_pct=70.0, min_requests=10}. Alert triggers when hit_rate<70% after 10+ requests. POST /cache/alerts/clear clears history. 2) Pricing Cache Warming - POST /cache/warm/{supplier} warms cache for popular routes. Returns {supplier, warmed, skipped}. GET /cache/popular-routes returns tracked routes. 3) Global Cache Diagnostics - GET /cache/diagnostics returns {global_hit_rate, total_entries, memory_usage_mb, evictions, utilization_pct, warming_status, uptime_seconds, supplier_count}. Frontend: hit-rate-alert-banner shows alert when active_alerts exist. cache-stats-bar now shows Evictions and Mem values. diagnostics-panel has 6 cards (diag-hit-rate, diag-entries, diag-memory, diag-evictions, diag-uptime, diag-suppliers). telemetry-panel shows warm-{supplier}-btn buttons for cache warming and alert-history-{n} items.

api_verification.GET /api/pricing-engine/cache/stats: ✅ 200 - Returns {total_entries, active_entries, hits, misses, hit_rate_pct, ttl_seconds, max_size, evictions, memory_usage_bytes, memory_usage_mb, active_alerts}
api_verification.GET /api/pricing-engine/cache/diagnostic: ✅ 200 - Returns {global_hit_rate, total_entries, active_entries, memory_usage_mb, memory_usage_bytes, evictions, max_size, utilization_pct, ttl_seconds, total_requests, hits, misses, avg_hit_latency_ms, avg_miss_latency_ms, uptime_seconds, active_alerts, warming_status, supplier_count}
api_verification.GET /api/pricing-engine/cache/telemetry: ✅ 200 - Returns extended metrics including evictions, memory_usage_mb, active_alerts, alert_history, warming_status

frontend_verification.Hit Rate Alert Banner: data-testid='hit-rate-alert-banner' - Shows alert message in Turkish with low_hit_rate badge
frontend_verification.Cache Stats Bar: data-testid='cache-stats-bar' - Shows Entries, Hits, Misses, Hit Rate, Evictions, Mem, ALERT badge
frontend_verification.Diagnostic Cards: diag-hit-rate, diag-entries, diag-memory, diag-evictions, diag-uptime, diag-suppliers
frontend_verification.Telemetry Panel: data-testid='telemetry-panel' - Shows supplier breakdown, alert history, invalidation log
frontend_verification.Warming Button: data-testid='warm-ratehawk-btn' - Flame icon button triggers cache warming

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. All cache features use in-memory PricingCache singleton. Cache warming uses tracked query frequency to determine popular routes.
